lockedDecisions.question: New list default stores?
lockedDecisions.decision: Copy from user_store_defaults at list creation time, filtered by list_type.

lockedDecisions.question: Migration of existing stores?
lockedDecisions.decision: Migrate to defaults only (list_type='grocery') — no backfill of existing lists.

lockedDecisions.question: Storage format?
lockedDecisions.decision: Relational — add list_id to stores table, drop user_id.

lockedDecisions.question: Defaults storage?
lockedDecisions.decision: New user_store_defaults table with list_type column (mirrors user_category_defaults).

lockedDecisions.question: Settings UI for defaults?
lockedDecisions.decision: Rename 'Category Defaults' to 'List Defaults'. Add Stores sub-section per eligible list type (grocery, packing, project).

lockedDecisions.question: StoreManager entry point?
lockedDecisions.decision: Remove top-level Stores tab. Add 'Manage Stores' to list context menu (ListSelector + MobileListDetail), ungated (owner + collaborators).

lockedDecisions.question: iOS Stores entry point?
lockedDecisions.decision: Remove Stores tab. Add 'Manage Stores' to list detail context menu / options sheet.

resumePrompt: Resume Concepture-Planner session planner-1780346707-0059f4. Active PRD draft: docs/drafts/prd-list-scoped-stores.md. Feature: move stores from per-user to per-list. user_store_defaults has list_type column. Store-supporting types: grocery, packing, project. Existing stores migrate to defaults with list_type='grocery'. StoreManager moves from top-level tab to list context menu (ungated). Settings renames 'Category Defaults' to 'List Defaults' with per-list-type Stores sub-section. 7 stories S-1 through S-7. Walkthrough complete — consistency pass in progress (Issue 2 was the trigger for the S-6 redesign, now resolved). Ready to wrap up consistency pass and mark ready.
